summary: Iteration 54: Pvt Paddy Cash Book & Diesel Integration - All 16 backend tests PASSED. Verified: 1) POST /api/private-paddy with cash_paid auto-creates cash_transactions (nikasi entry), 2) POST with diesel_paid auto-creates diesel_accounts entry, 3) Party ledger shows Pvt Paddy Purchase with debit=total_amount, credit for cash/diesel advances, 4) Party name format 'Party - Mandi' verified, 5) DELETE cascades to linked entries, 6) PUT updates linked entries correctly.

issues: Console 404 errors for backup endpoints (expected on web version, no impact)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend private_trading.py: _create_cashbook_diesel_for_pvt_paddy helper correctly creates cash_transactions with txn_type='nikasi', account='cash', reference='pvt_paddy_cash:{id[:8]}'
Backend private_trading.py: Diesel accounts created with linked_entry_id for proper cascade delete
Backend private_trading.py: On UPDATE, old linked entries are deleted before creating new ones (line 175-177)
Backend private_trading.py: On DELETE, cascade delete removes linked cash_transactions and diesel_accounts (line 185-186)
Backend ledgers.py: Party ledger correctly shows 'Pvt Paddy Purchase' as party_type with party_name format 'Party - Mandi'
Backend ledgers.py: Cash advance and diesel advance show as separate credit entries (lines 184-194)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Party Ledger and Cash Book display verified

seed_data_creation: None - tests use dynamic TEST_ prefixed data with auto-cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pvt Paddy auto cash book/diesel integration is fully working. Existing entries (before code change) won't have linked entries but new entries will. Party ledger shows 3 entries per pvt paddy (debit for purchase, credits for cash/diesel advances). Cash book nikasi entries reference format: pvt_paddy_cash:{entry_id[:8]}. Test verified: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE all properly cascade to linked entries.

party_ledger_pvt_paddy.entries_per_purchase: 3 (debit for total_amount, credits for cash/diesel advances)

pvt_paddy_update_linked_entries.behavior: Deletes old linked entries, creates new ones with updated amounts

cash_book_pvt_paddy_entries.shows: nikasi entries for pvt paddy cash advances

created_pvt_paddy_entry.verified_cascade_delete: Both cash and diesel entries deleted
